testcase.name: Fuomo Homepage Tests › Homepage loads successfully with status 200 and title
Fuomo Homepage Tests › Main UI elements are visible
testcase.failure:
[Desktop Chrome] › example.spec.ts:24:7 › Fuomo Homepage Tests › Main UI elements are visible ────
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('.logo') Expected: visible Timeout: 5000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('.logo')
25 | await homePage.goto(); 26 | > 27 | await expect(homePage.logo).toBeVisible(); | ^ 28 | await expect(homePage.navMenu).toBeVisible(); 29 | await expect(homePage.heroBanner).toBeVisible(); 30 | await expect(homePage.footer).toBeVisible(); at C:\xampp\htdocs\fuomo-qa-test\fuomo-qa-test\tests\example.spec.ts:27:33

testcase.name: Fuomo Homepage Tests › Navigation link works correctly
Fuomo Homepage Tests › Homepage loads successfully with status 200 and title
Fuomo Homepage Tests › Main UI elements are visible

testcase.name: Fuomo Homepage Tests › Navigation link works correctly
testcase.error: [Mobile Safari] › example.spec.ts:34:7 › Fuomo Homepage Tests › Navigation link works correctly ── Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded. Error: locator.click: Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('a:has-text("Login")') - locator resolved to
